props.title: Security Bank Mid Year Gadget Raffle Promo
props.description: Shop and win the latest gadgets or SM Gift Pass weekly! Spend at least PHP1,000 Straight transaction or PHP5,000 on Installment using your Security Bank credit card to earn e-raffle entries!

props.title: Get a chance to win amazing prizes

items.title: Weekly Draw
items.description: Apple and Samsung Gadgets plus SM Gift Pass Vouchers
items.details:

items.title: Grand Draw

items.details:
$$Get a chance to win these amazing prizes in the grand draw. Be sure to check out our website or Facebook page to see if the winner is you!
